name: Microsoft Defender for Cloud not on Standard tier for all resource types
description: One or more resource types (VMs, Storage, SQL, App Services, Key Vaults, Kubernetes, Container Registry, DNS, ARM) are not enrolled in Microsoft Defender for Cloud Standard tier. The Free tier does not provide threat detection, alerts, or vulnerability assessment.
remediation: Enable Defender for Cloud Standard on all resource types: Security Center → Environment Settings → Subscription → Defender plans → Enable all. Standard tier provides threat detection, JIT VM access, Adaptive Application Controls, and Vulnerability Assessment. Estimated cost: ~$15/server/month for VMs.
